query: SELECT id, entityName, fundingPurpose FROM business_plans LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT id, entityName, fundingPurpose FROM business_plans LIMIT 10;

rows.fundingPurpose: Real-Eye-Nation LLC requires funding to expand our media production and content creation capabilities that serve community education and cultural preservation. Our platform produces educational content, documentary films, and digital media that amplify underrepresented voices and preserve ancestral knowledge. Investment will enable us to upgrade production equipment, hire additional creative staff, expand distribution channels, and develop interactive educational content that reaches broader audiences while generating sustainable revenue streams.

The Calea Freeman Family Trust requires funding to establish and manage family assets that support multi-generational wealth building and legacy preservation. As a holding entity for intellectual property, real estate, and investment assets, the Trust needs resources to properly structure asset protection strategies, establish scholarship endowments for family education, acquire income-producing properties, and create sustainable distributions that benefit current and future generations while maintaining tax efficiency and legal compliance.

LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC requires funding to develop and deploy our comprehensive financial automation platform that serves families and small businesses in building autonomous wealth. Our system integrates financial tracking, automated savings, investment management, and wealth preservation tools designed specifically for underserved communities. Investment will enable us to enhance platform security, add advanced analytics features, expand user capacity, and develop educational modules that empower users to take control of their financial futures and build lasting generational wealth.

The L.A.W.S. Collective urgently needs funding to scale our technology-enabled workforce transition program. Our SaaS platform provides essential tools for transforming W-2 employees into independent business owners, but we require investment to expand platform development, enhance AI-powered business planning features, grow our contractor training program capacity, and extend community outreach to underserved populations. This funding will directly enable us to serve 100+ additional contractors annually and create 50+ new businesses within our target communities, generating lasting multi-generational wealth.

rows.entityName: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.
rows.fundingPurpose: LuvOnPurpose Academy requires funding to establish and expand our sovereign education program that serves families seeking faith-based, culturally-rooted learning alternatives. Our K-12 curriculum integrates ancestral wisdom with modern academic standards, but we need resources to develop additional Divine STEM modules, expand our language programs, train qualified educators, and establish physical learning spaces. This investment will enable us to enroll 200+ students in our first three years, provide scholarship opportunities for underserved families, and create a replicable model for community-based sovereign education.

stdout:
id	entityName	fundingPurpose
1	Real-Eye-Nation LLC	Real-Eye-Nation LLC requires funding to expand our media production and content creation capabilities that serve community education and cultural preservation. Our platform produces educational content, documentary films, and digital media that amplify underrepresented voices and preserve ancestral knowledge. Investment will enable us to upgrade production equipment, hire additional creative staff, expand distribution channels, and develop interactive educational content that reaches broader audiences while generating sustainable revenue streams.
2	Calea Freeman Family Trust	The Calea Freeman Family Trust requires funding to establish and manage family assets that support multi-generational wealth building and legacy preservation. As a holding entity for intellectual property, real estate, and investment assets, the Trust needs resources to properly structure asset protection strategies, establish scholarship endowments for family education, acquire income-producing properties, and create sustainable distributions that benefit current and future generations while maintaining tax efficiency and legal compliance.
3	LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC	LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC requires funding to develop and deploy our comprehensive financial automation platform that serves families and small businesses in building autonomous wealth. Our system integrates financial tracking, automated savings, investment management, and wealth preservation tools designed specifically for underserved communities. Investment will enable us to enhance platform security, add advanced analytics features, expand user capacity, and develop educational modules that empower users to take control of their financial futures and build lasting generational wealth.
4	The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC	The L.A.W.S. Collective urgently needs funding to scale our technology-enabled workforce transition program. Our SaaS platform provides essential tools for transforming W-2 employees into independent business owners, but we require investment to expand platform development, enhance AI-powered business planning features, grow our contractor training program capacity, and extend community outreach to underserved populations. This funding will directly enable us to serve 100+ additional contractors annually and create 50+ new businesses within our target communities, generating lasting multi-generational wealth.
5	LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.	LuvOnPurpose Academy requires funding to establish and expand our sovereign education program that serves families seeking faith-based, culturally-rooted learning alternatives. Our K-12 curriculum integrates ancestral wisdom with modern academic standards, but we need resources to develop additional Divine STEM modules, expand our language programs, train qualified educators, and establish physical learning spaces. This investment will enable us to enroll 200+ students in our first three years, provide scholarship opportunities for underserved families, and create a replicable model for community-based sovereign education.
